Off Calendar Apr-21-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jul-06-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Dept. 611, Judge Diane Wick, clerk-beth wilber, reporter-sara lerschen: c/c for settlement conference. Terry Gordon appearing for plaintiff Scott, Cheryl Bregma appearing for the City and County of San Francisco. Parties were not present in court. Counsel in form the court that the case has settled and terms are put on the record. Parties agree to a mutual dismissal of the action.
(After counsel had left the courtroom Deputy Attorney Rafal Ofierski appeared to confirm the settlement.)
